title: Warehouse Assistant (WMS & Inventory) | Kranji | Up to $2.6K + Bonus
description:
• Basic salary up to $2,600 + Variable Bonus.

  • Monday to Friday, 7:45 am to 5:30 pm (No weekends required!).

  • Located at Kranji

  • Focus on inventory accuracy and professional warehouse management.

Job Summary

We are looking for a hands-on Warehouse Assistant to support our daily operations. This role is vital for maintaining accurate inventory control and ensuring a smooth workflow for both inbound and outbound shipments. If you have experience with Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and a strong eye for detail, we want to hear from you.

Responsibilities

  • Handle receiving, picking, packing, sorting, and dispatching of goods safely.

  • Use WMS software to update stock movements, conduct regular cycle counts, and perform inventory reconciliation.

  • Follow proper FIFO/FEFO methods to ensure optimal stock freshness and turnover.

  • Verify the accuracy of delivery orders, invoices, and shipping documents while updating system records.

  • Inspect incoming goods for damage, label items correctly, and organize storage in designated areas.

  • Maintain a clean, organized, and safe warehouse environment and conduct basic checks on equipment.

Requirements

  • Must have inventory experience and proficiency in a Warehouse Management System (WMS).

  • Ability to use barcode scanners and inventory software; strong organizational skills.

  • Physically fit to perform warehouse tasks, including lifting and moving goods in a fast-paced environment.

  • A forklift license is an added advantage, but not required.

  • Minimum Nitec or Diploma in Warehousing, Logistics, or Supply Chain Management.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
